etimesLPG scam alert: Kolkata woman reveals how a simple call nearly led to bank fraudA Kolkata woman's mother narrowly avoided an LPG scam after receiving calls promising urgent assistance. Scammers, posing as LPG service providers, requested a video call and asked the mother to open her bank account. Fortunately, her vigilance prevented any financial loss, highlighting the need for caution against such fraudulent schemes.

etimesMan lives 8 years with 12 cm metal chopstick stuck in the throat; surgery finally removes itA Chinese man lived for eight years with a 12 cm metal chopstick lodged in his throat after accidentally swallowing it. He endured increasing pain, finally seeking medical help when discomfort became constant. Doctors successfully removed the chopstick through a minimally invasive oral surgery, and the patient has since recovered.
